title.en: Ye Tian didn't have any surprises about this, e...

content.en:
"The land of vanity is still occupied!"

Ye Tian didn't have any surprises about this, even if the Red Leaf Lord didn't occupy it, there would be other half-step Eternal Masters to occupy it.

Although there are countless resources in the boundary river, there are still many strong people to occupy some good resource treasure land.

In the boundary river, as long as the background is deep enough and the strength is strong enough~, there is no shortage of resources.

And Ye Tian still needs to rely on himself to fight for opportunities, there is no eternal controller behind him, even if he joins the Eternal Palace, the help given to him is very limited.

The Temple of Eternity gave him an opportunity and a guarantee, and he had to rely on himself.

After these six years of exploration, Ye Tian finally found a little information about the mastery-level time ancestor, of course, it was just a guess, not a certainty, after all, others couldn't see through the level of talent.

"Abis the Dragon!"

This is a very powerful race in the Boundary River, and it is rumored that this race has a strong time talent, but the time talent is strong and weak, and the powerful time talent is extremely rebellious.

Therefore, Ye Tian guessed that Abis Dragon might have a control-level time ancestor, and if there really was, he could copy it.

And the Abis dragon is not weak, so it also occupies an area of the Boundary River, which is called the Abbis Sacred Mountain, which is the eternal control of the Abis Dragon Clan, who moved treasure lands from all over the Boundary River, and pieced together these treasures into a sacred mountain that spreads hundreds of millions of territories.

In the entire Abbis Sacred Mountain, there are at least ten million Abis dragons and three Eternal Masters.

In terms of overall strength, the strength of the Abis dragon clan is no less than a giant city, but it is more terrifying than a giant city, so the Abis dragon clan belongs to a racial force, and it is naturally very united, but the inside of the giant city is not united.

However, the only trouble is that the Abis dragon clan is very protective of Abis Sacred Mountain, and he can't break into Abis Holy Mountain.

Therefore, he could only get close to some of the Abis dragons that came out to break through, but whether these Abis dragons had a control-level time ancestor or not, he couldn't guarantee it, he could only look at luck.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a place called the Otter Bone Giant City, because the Abis Dragon had appeared near here.

After coming to the Otter Bone Giant City, Ye Tian began to look for the Abis Dragon, and finally found an Abis Dragon at the peak of the fifth level after some investigation.

However.

"Legendary Time Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed, this kind of time ancestral endowment was too ordinary, he couldn't even reach the legendary realm, and it was of no use to him at all.

So, Ye Tian could only choose to leave.

It's not that Ye Tian didn't want to copy the body of an Abis dragon, but once it is copied, there is no way to carry the copy endowment, and he can only copy the body to have the copy sky.

If you don't have the talent of copying, you can't copy the talent of other Abis Dragons unless you use the body of the Abis Dragon to infiltrate with the body.

But in this way, it is too easy to be discovered.

Once he gets the Abis Dragons, even if the Eternal Temple can keep him, he will not be able to move an inch in the Boundary River in the future, and he may be assassinated by the eternal masters of the Abis Dragons, so he can only hide in the Void forever.

Therefore, the plan to infiltrate the sacred mountain of Abis can only be put on hold.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian looked for the Abis Dragon again and again, but he was disappointed, the Abis Dragon clan he encountered was either a legendary-level time ancestor or a legendary-level time ancestor, and there was no control-level time ancestor at all.

Ye Tian had no choice but to wait slowly, but this day a piece of news came, but Ye Tian saw hope.

"The genius of the Abis Dragon Clan, the son of the Jinluan Controller of the Abis Dragon Clan, and the Lord of the Fifth Rank Peak Legendary Realm, Lord Ou Yu, is going to the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower. "

This news spread within a certain range, if it weren't for the fact that Ye Tian had been inquiring about the news of the Abis Dragon Clan, he wouldn't have known about it.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Tower is a unique place in the Boundary River, rumored to have been built by an Eternal Master, and that Eternal Master's strength far surpasses that of other Eternal Masters, and it is so famous that it is called the Half-Tooth Master.

But a long time ago, the half-tooth master disappeared, and even the servants under the command of the half-tooth master did not know, and the half-tooth ancient tower was no longer controlled, but still no one dared to occupy the half-tooth ancient tower, after all, no one knew when the half-tooth master would return.

After all, the Eternal Master can cross the timeline in the Eternal Realm, and maybe the Half-Tooth Master has gone to the distant future.

Therefore, no one dares to do anything to the property under the command of the half-tooth master.

In fact, there are many places like the Halftooth Ancient Tower, where the Eternal Masters have disappeared and don't know where they have gone, and there are no owners of treasures, buildings, and territories, but no one dares to snatch them.

Ask for flowers

Although no one dares to occupy the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, many people want to break into the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, just because the half-tooth ancient tower is very famous, and once it breaks through a certain number of layers, it will help to enhance their fame.

Of course, the main reason is not so, but the half-tooth secret domain.

The Half-Tooth Secret Domain is a treasure land occupied by the Half-Tooth Master, but the Half-Tooth Controller promises to open it to the outside world, but the premise is that you must break through the sixth layer of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, as long as you break through the sixth layer, you are eligible to enter the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

This is also the reason why many peak Legendary Realm lords have come to break into the Halftooth Ancient Tower.

However, it is not possible to break through to the sixth layer of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower if you are strong, the requirements for each level are different, and you can still break through the sixth layer if you are low in strength, provided that you are genius enough.

......... ，.0

There was even a promise from the Eternal Master that if anyone broke through the eighth layer of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda, he would even be willing to take him as his own personal disciple.

It can be seen from this that the sixth level of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower is so difficult, once it is passed, it will inevitably become famous, and if it breaks through the eighth layer, it will even attract the attention of some eternal masters.

If it is when the half-tooth master is still there, if he breaks through the eighth layer, I am afraid that the half-tooth master can be accepted as a disciple.

But now that the Half-Tooth Controller is missing, the other Eternal Masters dare to intercept the disciple halfway.

According to what Ye Tian already knew, after the disappearance of the half-tooth master, there were several peak Legendary Realm lords who had broken through the eighth layer, all of whom had been accepted as personal disciples by other Eternal Masters, and there were also many geniuses who had passed through the seventh layer, and they had also been accepted as several disciples.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda is opened every 10,000 river years.

Therefore, this time it attracted a lot of geniuses, including the Ouyu Lord of the Abis Dragon Clan who would go to the Halftooth Ancient Tower.

Of course, as the son of the Eternal Master, Lord Ouyu naturally doesn't care about the favor of the Eternal Master, his purpose is probably to make a name for himself, because he is young enough and not yet famous enough, and others know about him, also because of his father, not him.

So, he wanted to prove himself.

"Lord Ouyu is very likely to have a mastery-level time ancestor, I also have to go there, and by the way, I can break into the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower!"

Ye Tian secretly said a thousand. _
